$comment: Production image migration manifest for Solomiya Energy (Tilda -> self-hosted marketing-web). Derived from a read-only crawl of the 31 indexed live URLs on 2026-06-28. REVIEW-ONLY: no asset is downloaded or committed by generating this file. Use download-solomiya-images.mjs + optimize-solomiya-images.mjs to populate scratch, then optimized output goes to marketing-web/public/images/solomiya/. Licensing of stock/AI-generated files MUST be confirmed by owner before publishing (see plan doc §Risks).

meta.sourceCrawl: read-only crawl of 31 indexed live URLs (Tilda apex behind Cloudflare)
meta.decision: Owner-locked: Option B self-host; optimize heavy files; logo special-case.

logoFix.problem: 1.49 MB SVG wrapping an embedded base64 bitmap, loaded on all 31 pages (critical render path).
logoFix.resolution: Solomiya theme SiteChrome.tsx renders a TEXT brand (NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_NAME), not this image — so the 1.49MB logo is already eliminated from the new design. If a graphical logo is later required, ship a real vector or ~15-40KB PNG.

localOriginalsPreferred.note: Prefer local high-quality originals over Tilda-recompressed copies where the same shot exists.

sources.use: equipment vendor logos (prefer official vendor SVG)
